title: Not Enough Recipes - Dynamic Item/Block Registry Schema
description: Complete JSON schema for dynamically registering items and blocks in Minecraft 1.21.11. Supports ALL Minecraft data components.

id.description: Unique item identifier (no namespace, automatically prefixed with 'ner:')

tags.description: Item tags for categorization and queries

components.description: Minecraft 1.21.11 data components - ALL components are supported

max_damage.description: Maximum durability (cannot be combined with max_stack_size > 1)

enchantment_glint_override.description: Force enchantment glint on (true) or off (false)

unbreakable.description: Makes item unbreakable - use empty object {}

custom_name.description: Custom display name (can be changed in anvil, shows italic by default)

item_name.description: Default item name (cannot be changed in anvil, not italic)

lore.description: Item lore (max 256 lines). Each line can be a text component OR an array of text components for multi-colored text on a single line.

oneOf.description: Single text component (one color per line)
Array of text components for multi-colored text on a single line (gradients, color changes, etc.)

enchantments.description: Active enchantments (map of enchantment ID to level)

type.description: Attribute ID (1.21.11+ no longer uses generic./player./zombie. prefixes)

consumable.description: REQUIRED for items to be consumable (eat/drink). In 1.21.11+, food component alone is not enough!

food.description: Food stats (must be used WITH consumable component in 1.21.11+)

can_always_eat.description: Can be eaten even when hunger is full

weapon.description: Weapon properties (damage to item per attack, shield disabling)

disable_blocking_for_seconds.description: Seconds to disable blocking shields on hit

equippable.description: Makes item equippable in specific slot

camera_overlay.description: Overlay texture when worn (e.g., pumpkin blur)

oneOf.description: RGB color as decimal (Red<<16 + Green<<8 + Blue)

custom_model_data.description: NEVER include this property, it breaks our rendering system

item_model.description: NEVER include this property, it breaks our rendering system

enchantable.description: Makes item enchantable in enchanting table

repairable.description: Items that can repair this in an anvil

can_break.description: Blocks this item can break in Adventure mode

can_place_on.description: Blocks this item can be placed on in Adventure mode

ominous_bottle_amplifier.description: Bad Omen amplifier for ominous bottles

jukebox_playable.description: Jukebox song ID to play when inserted

use_remainder.description: Item to return after use (e.g., bowl from mushroom stew)

cooldown_group.description: Share cooldown with other items in same group

use_effects.description: Movement penalties and vibrations when using

death_protection.description: Protects holder from death (totem of undying effect)

death_effects.description: Effects applied when saved from death

bypassed_by.description: Damage type tag that bypasses blocking

minimum_attack_charge.description: Minimum attack indicator charge to attack

break_sound.description: Sound when item breaks from durability

container.description: Items in container (shulker box, chest, etc.)

pot_decorations.description: Pottery sherd decorations on decorated pot (4 items)

note_block_sound.description: Sound for note block with this head above

tags.description: Block tags for mining, tools, etc.

requires_correct_tool.description: Requires correct tool to drop items

components.description: Data components for the BlockItem (same as item components)

drops.description: Custom drops when block is mined. If omitted, uses vanilla behavior (drops itself). Works with requires_correct_tool property.

block_drop.description: Defines what item(s) drop when a block is mined

count.description: Exact count to drop (used if min/max not specified)

min.description: Minimum count for random range (requires max)

max.description: Maximum count for random range (requires min)

important_notes.food_items: In Minecraft 1.21.11+, items need BOTH 'consumable' and 'food' components to be edible. The 'consumable' component makes it consumable, while 'food' provides nutrition stats.
important_notes.can_always_eat: Only works when BOTH 'consumable' and 'food' components are present with 'food.can_always_eat: true'
important_notes.effects: Food effects are now in 'consumable.on_consume_effects', not 'food.effects'
important_notes.all_components_supported: ALL Minecraft 1.21.11 data components are supported via automatic JSON-to-SNBT conversion
important_notes.text_component_lists: Text components can be passed as lists of text_component objects, to have multiple colored/styled parts in a single line. In an item lore this counts as a second dimension of the lore array.
